messages.text:
Hi there! 👋 I'm **Rux**, your Roblox Studio AI assistant. I'm connected live to your Studio session and ready to help!

Here are some things I can do for you:

- 📝 **Read, write, or create scripts** (Server, Local, Module)
- 🔍 **Search your codebase** for variables, functions, or patterns
- 🏗️ **Build and modify instances** (Parts, Tools, Folders, GUIs, etc.)
- 🐛 **Debug errors** and check your scripts for issues
- ⚙️ **Set properties** on any object in the Explorer tree

What are you working on today? Let me know how I can help! 🚀
